meaning: v.(为少量特定听众)小范围播送,用电缆电视播送
examples: An implementation scheme of digital narrowcast system was presented in this paper.
The narrowcast communication-on-demand website model will deliver information formatted in audio and video programs.
Channel Me transforms the Arrow Factory into a one-room television production studio that will create original programming on-site to be "narrowcast" within the space.
That explains why the parties narrowcast for fat-walleted candidates who can shoulder the burden themselves.
Over time, the mix of broadcast and narrowcast video and interactive Internet content will shift.
